name: monkey
description: a black monkey that has electric aura and can spawn weapons out of electricity in battle

moves.name: sword burrage
moves.desc: my fakemon spawns a bunch of swords and rapidly launches them at the enemy.

moves.name: zeus bolt
moves.desc: my fakemon spawns a huge bolt in the sky and launches it at the enemy

moves.name: poisonous zap
moves.desc: my fakemon zaps the enemy which lowers the enemy's accuracy stat

moves.name: taser
moves.desc: shoots a mini thunder bolt at the enemy which makes them fall asleep
